title: Caller Voices
seoTitle: Game Of Darts Caller Voices | BarkinMad Studios
description: Discover how Caller Voices bring every match to life with spoken score announcements and match commentary in Game Of Darts.
summary: Choose between Daniel and Serena to hear spoken score announcements and key match moments during your games.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game Of Darts Caller Voices

sections.heading: Bring Every Match to Life
paragraphs: Caller Voices add spoken score announcements and key match updates throughout your games, creating a more immersive darts experience.
Using Apple's built-in speech technology, the feature delivers clear, natural voice announcements without requiring additional downloads or internet access.

sections.heading: Available Voices
paragraphs: Choose between two built-in caller voices, both powered by Apple's text-to-speech technology.
bullets: Voice quality may vary slightly depending on your iOS version and installed system voices.

sections.heading: How Caller Voices Work
paragraphs: During supported matches, the selected caller announces scores and important moments automatically, helping recreate the atmosphere of a real darts game.
Everything runs locally on your device using Apple's speech technology, so no additional setup is required after enabling the feature.

sections.heading: Voice Settings
paragraphs: You can enable, disable, or change the caller voice at any time from the Settings screen.
Switching between Daniel and Serena never affects your saved matches, player statistics, or other app data.

images.alt: Artwork for Game Of Darts Caller Voices
images.caption: Choose the caller voice that suits your style of play.

featureShowcases.heading: Enjoy Spoken Match Commentary
featureShowcases.summary: Caller Voices announce scores and important match moments as you play.
body: Spoken announcements help create the atmosphere of a real darts match while keeping your attention on the game instead of the screen.
Whether you're playing on your own or with friends, Caller Voices make every match feel more engaging.
bullets: Powered by Apple's built-in speech technology.
Adds atmosphere without changing gameplay or scoring.

image.caption: Hear scores and match updates throughout every game.

featureShowcases.heading: Personalise Your Match Experience
featureShowcases.summary: Choose the caller voice that best suits the way you play.
body: Voice preferences can be changed whenever you like, making it easy to switch between voices or play without announcements.
Your choice is remembered automatically and never affects saved games, player statistics, or match history.
bullets: No impact on saved games or player statistics.
Works alongside your other audio and appearance preferences.

image.alt: Game Of Darts settings screen showing caller voice options
image.caption: Manage your preferred caller voice from the Settings screen.
